# AtendentePro

> Multi-agent customer-service orchestration framework — v0.61.0.
> Public documentation and examples mirror of BeMonkAI/atendentepro.

## Getting started

- [README](README.md): overview and quickstart
- [Setup guide](setup_passo_a_passo/README.md): step-by-step install & config

## Examples by feature

- [access filters](examples/access_filters/README.md)
- [agent style](examples/agent_style/README.md)
- [custom embeddings](examples/custom_embeddings/README.md)
- [custom provider](examples/custom_provider/README.md)
- [custom user context](examples/custom_user_context/README.md)
- [dialect](examples/dialect/)
- [history window](examples/history_window/README.md)
- [memory user session](examples/memory_user_session/README.md)
- [multi agents](examples/multi_agents/README.md)
- [multi knowledge](examples/multi_knowledge/README.md)
- [multi provider](examples/multi_provider/README.md)
- [multiagent](examples/multiagent/)
- [optim](examples/optim/)
- [single reply](examples/single_reply/README.md)
- [user loader](examples/user_loader/README.md)
